_meta.purpose: Phase 5 Plan 05-00 Task 3 realm patch. Adds the tbe-b2b realm with tbe-agent-portal OIDC client (redirectUris :3001 per D-22), audience mapper emitting aud=tbe-api (Pitfall 4), agency_id user-attribute mapper (D-23), and tbe-b2b-admin service client with manage-users role (Pitfall 8). Import with `kc.sh import --file /opt/keycloak/data/import/realm-tbe-b2b.json` or partial import via Keycloak admin console.
_meta.supersedes: infra/keycloak/realms/tbe-b2b-realm.json (partial — this file adds audience + agency_id mappers, service-account client, and agent roles)

clients._comment: B2B agent OIDC client consumed by src/portals/b2b-web via Auth.js v5 (D-22, D-32). redirectUris and webOrigins reference port 3001 per UI-SPEC §Portal Differentiation.

protocolMappers._comment: Pitfall 4 fix — emits aud=tbe-api on access tokens so YARP JwtBearer can validate the B2B JWT scheme (Plan 05-01 gateway cutover).
protocolMappers.name: tbe-api-audience

protocolMappers._comment: D-23 — emit agency_id user attribute as JWT claim on access + id tokens. Server reads this in every B2B endpoint per Pitfall 26 / 28. Single-valued per D-33 (one user = one agency).
protocolMappers.name: agency-id-attribute

clients._comment: Pitfall 8 fix — dedicated service client for admin operations (create sub-agent per B2B-10 / Plan 05-01, send-verify-email). client_credentials grant; secret kept out of the browser bundle (no NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix).

realm.name: agent
realm.description: D-32 — standard travel agent. Agency-wide booking visibility (D-34) but no /admin/* access.

realm.name: agent-admin
realm.description: D-32 — agency admin. Adds /admin/agents (sub-agent create per B2B-10) and /admin/wallet (top-up per B2B-07) access; may set per-booking markup override per D-37.

realm.name: agent-readonly
realm.description: D-35 — finance/compliance oversight. Read-only agency-wide view; every mutation MUST 403 for this role.

realm-management._comment: Service-account role binding — allows tbe-b2b-admin to call Keycloak Admin REST API users / send-verify-email endpoints (Pitfall 8). Plan 05-01 Task 2 exercises create-user + role-assign against this grant.
